Name: Red Sift
Author: Red Sift - support@redsift.com
Description: The Red Sift solution provides real-time event ingestion from your Red Sift applications into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) Push pattern. It supports authentication events from Red Sift Pulse and email forensics events from OnDMARC, pushing activity, severity, user information, email details, and network data directly to Azure Monitor for analysis, alerting, and visualization.
